notes:
**New & changed**

- **Selection bands now match Dropbox Paper.** On a partial row, the highlight hugs your text instead of running all the way to the column edge, and a bullet marker stays *outside* the band when its line is only partly selected — so a selection that starts mid-line looks exactly like the text it covers. Fully-covered rows keep their single straight left edge and pull markers and indent inside the band, as before. (PRD Addendum 23 §V2 — the Paper-bar rules, amended and re-ratified 2026-07-15.)
- **Open the block menu from the keyboard.** The right-click block menu now also opens with **Shift+F10**, so every block action is reachable without a mouse. (PRD Addendum 19 §S4.)

**Fixes & polish** — this release closes roughly fifty correctness, data-safety, and accessibility bugs surfaced by the editor conformance campaign (see *Under the hood*). Grouped by what you'll notice:

- **Your writing can't be lost to timing.** Edits are no longer dropped by two saves racing at once, by a note that failed to load, by a title rename landing as the app quits, or by an image pasted into a bullet while you keep typing. (PRD Addendum 16; Addendum 20 §T1: zoom is "a view, never a data change.")
- **Big and unusual notes open instantly.** A note with thousands of blocks Infiniti doesn't recognise (from an old build, import, or sync) now opens immediately — it was previously slow to the point of being unopenable.
- **Selecting and editing text behaves.** **Cmd+A** now reliably selects everything, every time. **Undo** moves in single sensible steps and can walk auto-formatting back to the literal text you typed (so an accidental heading or list marker is one undo away from plain text). Plus many small caret, selection, and block-gutter refinements. (PRD Addenda 19 / 20 / 23.)
- **European keyboard layouts work correctly.** Typing **AltGr** characters (like `@`, `€`, `{`) no longer fires app shortcuts by mistake, and can no longer accidentally flip your theme.
- **Zoom is fixed on Windows and Linux.** Zooming into a heading no longer collapses its section on those platforms. (PRD Addendum 20 §T.)
- **Accessibility across the board.** Screen-reader labelling and high-contrast (forced-colors) support now cover links, tags, images, menus, and dialogs, meeting their WCAG targets.
- **The todo checkbox lines up with its text** at last.
- **Mobile pinch-zoom is no longer mistaken for the keyboard** opening, so the layout stays put.

**Under the hood**

- The editor conformance suite reached **1,455 scenarios across 22 dimensions**, with **71% now machine-verified on the shipping macOS WKWebView lane** (up from 27% at the campaign's start), zero product-fault failures for the third measurement run running. The catalog lives in `docs/testing/editor-conformance/`. Per-PR CI now runs the correctness tiers only; the performance tier moved to a **separate nightly lane** so the PR gate stays fast and load-honest.
